headlines.title: Democratic grassroots group to target more than 60 races with ambitious canvassing effort
headlines.description: A Democratic grassroots organization seeking to conduct at least 500,000 substantive conversations with voters across the battleground map this year said it is expanding its list of targets to more than 60 contested congressional and state races.

headlines.title: Xi warns Trump of possible conflict over Taiwan at grand Beijing summit
headlines.description: BEIJING — Chinese President Xi Jinping warned Thursday of “clashes and even conflicts” with the United States over Taiwan, cautioning President Donald Trump that tensions over the Beijing-claimed island could jeopardize ties between the world’s two biggest economies

headlines.title: U.S. Taiwan policies ‘unchanged’ after Trump-Xi meeting, Rubio says
headlines.description: In an interview with NBC News’ Tom Llamas, Secretary of State Marco Rubio said the U.S. policy toward Taiwan are “unchanged” after President Trump met with Chinese President Xi. Xi previously warned Trump that tensions over Taiwan could jeopardize U.S.-China relations, leading to “clashes and even conflicts” if the issue is not handled carefully.

headlines.title: China warns Taiwan tensions could jeopardize U.S. relationship
headlines.description: President Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping visited the Temple of Heaven after their two-hour bilateral meeting. NBC News’ Garrett Haake reports that, according to Chinese state media, Taiwan was among the most important topics discussed.

headlines.title: President Trump visits Temple of Heaven following historic U.S.-China summit
headlines.description: President Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping visited the Temple of Heaven after their two-hour bilateral meeting. NBC News’ Garrett Haake and Brian Cheung report on the key issues discussed and the leaders’ cultural visit to the Temple of Heaven.

headlines.title: The war is on hold, but Iran’s internal crackdown is only deepening
headlines.description: While the Iranian regime has been battling its external enemies, Israel and the U.S., it has also been ramping up a deadly crackdown on those seen as the enemy within.

headlines.title: The cage match is on for tickets to Trump’s UFC fight at the White House
headlines.description: 4,000-plus spectators who are lucky enough, cunning enough or rich enough will score a seat to the UFC fight on the South Lawn next month.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Bill Cassidy’s vaccine advocacy is putting his Senate future in peril as contends with MAHA
headlines.description: Sen. Bill Cassidy’s advocacy for vaccines and his résumé as a doctor have defined his political career

headlines.title: Seven years after Biden predicted a GOP ‘epiphany’ over Trump, Democrats are moving on
headlines.description: Seven years ago, Joe Biden boldly proclaimed that Republicans would have an “epiphany” after Donald Trump lost the election. That didn’t pan out.

headlines.title: Vance announces suspension of $1.3 billion in Medicaid payments to California
headlines.description: Vice President JD Vance said the Trump administration is withholding $1.3 billion in Medicaid payments to California and is threatening to suspend federal funding to all states if they don’t aggressively prosecute fraud in their Medicaid programs.
